opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Hi, I've had this indigestion feeling on and off since yesterday afternoon, kind of a burning in my chest. I tried some antacid but it's not really helping. Should I be worried?
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's still there this morning and I have school today — I need to know if I can go in.

symptom_narrative.duration: on and off since yesterday, so about 18 hours now
symptom_narrative.character: burning, kind of like indigestion or heartburn
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: maybe a 5 out of 10 at worst, more like a 3 right now
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in my chest, sort of in the middle
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes and goes — not there all the time
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting down seems to help a bit, and the antacid took the edge off slightly
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: not sure, it just seems to come on by itself
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no other symptoms really, just the burning feeling
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had something like this before — usually goes away on its own after a day or two
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm okay to move around but I don't feel great — mainly worried about making it through the school day

past_medical_history.how_managed: a tablet at night, I think it's a statin

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: rosuvastatin, I think — the cholesterol one
current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: one at night, I forget the dose

family_history_as_reported.narrative: Dad had some heart trouble in his 60s — I think he had a stent put in
Mum has type 2 diabetes as well

social_history_volunteered.smoking_status: ex-smoker, quit about 10 years ago, used to smoke about half a pack a day
social_history_volunteered.alcohol: social only, maybe a glass of wine on weekends
social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: fairly sedentary — desk job and school work, don't get much formal exercise
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: been pretty busy with end-of-term preparations, a bit stressed

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants reassurance she can go to work today; not connecting symptoms to heart

communication_style.typical_message_style: writes in complete sentences, gives context, responds to questions directly but briefly

access_barriers.transport: has own car and partner at home; 15 minutes from Royal Perth Hospital
